name: Rich Mushroom Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 packets G. Washington's Rich Brown Seasoning&Broth
3 teaspoons cornstarch dissolved in 1/4 cup water
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, heat oil over medium heat.
2. Add onion and garlic and cook, stirring often, until onion is soft, about 5 minutes.
3. Add mushrooms and cook, stirring often, until mushrooms begin to release their juices.
4. Add water, soy sauce, G. Washington Rich Brown Seasoning & Broth, and cornstarch dissolved in water.
5. Stir well and simmer until thickened slightly, about 10-15 minutes.
6. Season with salt and freshly ground pepper.
